title: AIIMS Guwahati Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Guwahati (AIIMS Guwahati)
shortInfo: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Guwahati (AIIMS Guwahati) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Guwahati has released the official notification for 1 Assistant Professor (Contractual) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Guwahati Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Guwahati (AIIMS Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Guwahati (AIIMS Guwahati) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Guwahati has released the official notification for 1 Assistant Professor (Contractual) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 05 years, OBC: 03 years, PwBD (OH-OL & BL): 10 years, Government Servant: 05 years

qualification.education_qualification: MD/MS or equivalent for Medical Candidates, M.Sc. (Medical Anatomy) and Ph.D. for Non-Medical Candidates
qualification.details: For Medical Candidates: A medical qualification included in the I or II schedule or part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956. A postgraduate qualification e.g. MD/MS or a recognized qualification equivalent thereto in the respective discipline/subject. For Non-Medical Candidates: Postgraduate qualification e.g. Master degree in the discipline/allied subject. A Doctorate degree of a recognized University in concerned discipline. For Anatomy: M.Sc. (Medical Anatomy) and Doctorate degree from a recognized university. Experience for Medical Candidates: Three years teaching and/or research experience in recognized Institution in the subject of speciality after obtaining the qualifying degree of M.D. /M.S. or qualification recognized equivalent thereto. Experience for Non-Medical Candidates: Three years teaching and/or research experience in the discipline/subject concerned after obtaining the Doctorate degree.

selection_process: Screening of applications Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Guwahati Assistant Professor (Contractual) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Guwahati Assistant Professor (Contractual) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the soft copy of the application via email is 31st May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: For Medical candidates, an MD/MS or equivalent is required. For Non-Medical candidates, an M.Sc. (Medical Anatomy) and Ph.D. are necessary. Specific details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Professor (Contractual) post is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST, OBC, PwBD, and Government Servants as per rules.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 1,500. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor (Contractual) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,42,506 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a screening of applications, followed by an interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual appointment for the post of Assistant Professor at AIIMS Guwahati.

faq.question: Q8. Where is AIIMS Guwahati located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted via email with complete bio-data and required documents before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your reference.
